phase.night.start: Night falls on the village… Everyone close your eyes.
phase.day.start_with_death: {name} was devoured last night. They were {article} {role}.
phase.day.start_no_death: The village woke up peacefully. Tonight, no one was harmed.
phase.day.start_multi_death: Last night was deadly. {names} have perished.
phase.day.prelude_death: Dawn breaks… but last night left its mark.
phase.vote.start: It is time to vote. Designate a suspect.
phase.vote.tie: The vote is tied… No one is eliminated tonight.
phase.vote.result: {name} was eliminated by the village. They were {article} {role}.
phase.game_over.wolves_win: The werewolves have devoured the entire village. The wolves win!
phase.game_over.village_win: All werewolves have been eliminated. The village wins!
phase.game_over.lovers_win: The lovers have survived. Love triumphs!
phase.role_reveal.start: Each player will now discover their role.
role.villager.name: Villager
role.villager.description: You are a simple villager. Sniff out the werewolves during the vote!
role.werewolf.name: Werewolf
role.werewolf.description: You are a werewolf. Devour villagers at night without being unmasked.
role.seer.name: Seer
role.seer.description: Each night, you can look into a player's eyes and discover if they are a werewolf.
role.hunter.name: Hunter
role.hunter.description: If you are eliminated, you may take another player with you into death.
role.hunter.death_prompt: You are dead! Designate a player to take with you.
role.elder.name: Elder
role.elder.description: You survive the first werewolf attack. The second will be fatal.
role.scapegoat.name: Scapegoat
role.scapegoat.description: If the vote ends in a tie, you die instead.
role.little_girl.name: Little Girl
role.little_girl.description: At night, you can try to spy on the wolves. Be careful not to get caught!
role.witch.name: Witch
role.witch.description: You have a healing potion and a poison, each usable only once.
role.witch.save_prompt: Do you want to use your healing potion to save {name}?
role.witch.poison_prompt: Do you want to use your poison to kill someone?
role.witch.no_save_potion: You have already used your healing potion.
role.witch.no_poison_potion: You have already used your poison.
role.cupid.name: Cupid
role.cupid.description: On the first night, you link two players with love. If one dies, they both die.
role.alpha_wolf.name: Alpha Wolf
role.alpha_wolf.description: Once per game, you can convert a villager into a werewolf.
role.alpha_wolf.sleep: Alpha Wolf… go back to sleep.
role.alpha_wolf.action_prompt: Designate a villager to convert (or skip).
role.minion.name: Minion
role.minion.description: You know the identity of the werewolves. You win if the wolves win.
role.sheriff.name: Sheriff
role.sheriff.description: Your vote counts double. The sheriff is elected at the start of each day.
elimination.wolf_kill: {name} was killed last night. They were {article} {role}.
elimination.village_vote: {name} was eliminated by the village. They were {article} {role}.
elimination.witch_poison: {name} was poisoned by the Witch. They were {article} {role}.
elimination.scapegoat: {name} is the scapegoat of this tie. They were {article} {role}.
ui.setup.title: New game
ui.reveal.title: Role Reveal
ui.vote.title: Village Vote
ui.night.title: Night
ui.day.title: Day
ui.game_over.title: Game Over
